passage: Your nervous system fires an alarm before your mind catches up. The panic is real but the threat may not be.
thesis: Your nervous system fires an alarm before your mind catches up. The panic is real but the threat may not be.

passage: That morning she opened her laptop. Her jaw was tight. Her shoulders pulled up. The email read Urgent. Her body had already decided what it meant.
thesis: The body decides before the mind. The alarm is real; the threat may not be.

passage: This technique will cure your anxiety permanently. Sign up now. Generalized anxiety disorder and PTSD.
